query: SELECT 'intakeFileAttachments' as tbl, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM intakeFileAttachments WHERE createdAt > '2026-04-03' UNION ALL SELECT 'orgNotes', COUNT(*) FROM orgNotes WHERE createdAt > '2026-04-03' UNION ALL SELECT 'partnerDocuments', COUNT(*) FROM partnerDocuments WHERE createdAt > '2026-04-03';
